task_completion.description: Open the edit page for the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' product
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin interface is visible, showing the 'Edit Product' page with the title field containing 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.

task_completion.description: Set the catalog visibility to 'Search results only'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Publish' panel on the right side, the 'Catalog visibility' setting is expanded and the radio button for 'Search results only' is selected.
In the 'Product data' section, the 'Inventory' tab is selected, and the checkbox for 'Sold individually' (Limit purchases to 1 item per order) is checked.

task_completion.description: Append the required text to the product's short description
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product short description' text editor area, the exact text '*** LIMIT 1 PER CUSTOMER ***' is visible at the end of the existing description.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the product
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Update' button in the 'Publish' panel has been clicked, typically evidenced by a 'Product updated.' success message at the top of the page.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress admin GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WordPress web interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WordPress/WooCommerce application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard WordPress admin dashboard and WooCommerce product edit screens are visible in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not make unrelated changes to the product
integrity.visual_evidence: The product title, price, and other settings not mentioned in the task description remain unchanged.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'. Required visibility setting: 'Search results only' (radio button in Catalog visibility). Required inventory setting: 'Sold individually' checkbox must be checked. Required text to append to the Product Short Description: '*** LIMIT 1 PER CUSTOMER ***'.
